meaning: adj.性爱的,性欲的,色情的n.好色之徒
examples: What do you mean by erotic?
The erotic is more of the imagination part.
Yeah, I think so, because the erotic is a way of.
Graham's 1962 work is itself an extended rehash, with erotic emphases, of the choreographer's earlier efforts in this world.
"People are tired of the erotic, the salacious and the nasty in literature, " said the writer Noah Brooks in 1891.
